---
title: "PuMP*: SIGHTLESS TRUFFLE"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

__BACKGROUND__ <br>
H

__PHYSICAL FEATURES__ <br>
__:__ 

__PERSONALITY QUIRKS__ <br>
__X but Y:__  <br>
__W yet Z:__ 

__FAVOURED GEAR__

- Ghillie suit
- Ultimate Iron hollow handle survival knife
- 

__PRIMAL STATS__ <br>
JAWS:0 | EYES:+1 | LIMBS:+2 | NERVES:0

__PRIMAL ABILITIES__ <br>
__Smell-nar\*:__ He has a remarkable sense of smell and can envsion the world with it.
Breaking the law of physicis he's able to sense smells that are downwind of his position.
His maximum range is based on the amount of smells, he can only process so much, and physical barriers. <br>
__Hyphae-nated:__ His skin is covered in fungus that can extract nutrients from the ground.
The fungus then shares these nutrients with its host*.
This is an incredibly useful ability for hiding in one spot for prolonged periods.

*I'm very envious of this knife. Its an original made for the first Oxbow movie! 
*Smell Navigation And Ranging, like sonar but with smell
*NIGHTJAR has tried giving thefungus to other people but they only survive on SIGHTLESS TRUFFLE
